title: Rotten Tomatoes Predicts the 2026 Golden Globes Winners
text: Rotten Tomatoes 2026 Golden Globes Predictions. Film Categories: Best Picture Drama: Sentimental Value. Best Picture Comedy: One Battle After Another. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson (One Battle After Another). Best Screenplay: Ryan Coogler (Sinners). Leading Actor Drama: Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent). Leading Actor Comedy/Musical: Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme). Leading Actress Drama: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet). Leading Actress Comedy: Rose Byrne (If I Had Legs I'd Kick You). Supporting Actor: Jacob Elordi (Frankenstein). Supporting Actress: Amy Madigan (Weapons). Animated Feature: K-Pop Demon Hunters. Original Score: Ludwig Göransson (Sinners). Original Song: Golden (K-Pop Demon Hunters). Television Highlights: Drama Series: The Pitt. Comedy Series: The Studio. Limited Series: Adolescence. The article notes these two Warner Bros. films as the season's primary contenders.
